location: Random drop from spear-wielding Exile Soldiers around Stormveil Castle, most reliably a lone Castle Guard up the wooden stairs near Rampart Tower grace.
tactics: The Rampart Tower guard is an easy, low-risk farm target — pull him alone rather than the larger group below
Killing Patches in Murkwater Cave after he begs for mercy also drops a pre-upgraded +7 copy of this same Spear — a shortcut if you're willing to lose him as a merchant
Easy to mix up with the visually similar Short Spear or Spiked Spear at a glance — check the moveset/skill (Impaling Thrust) if you're unsure which one dropped
Drop rate is a low 2%, so expect to fight through several Exile Soldiers before it appears
lore: A wholly unremarkable spear — a plain blade fixed to a long shaft, designed to be thrust out from behind a raised shield and especially effective at keeping mounted attackers at bay.

builds.name: Early Dex poke
builds.why: E Strength/D Dexterity scaling and cheap requirements make it a fine dexterity-leaning early spear before better options appear
